summary: Completed backend + frontend regression for room/profile identity source-of-truth cleanup. Verified create/join forms have no area field, create/join payloads do not send area/study field, private/public room flows work, participant/chat study field is resolved from profile when available and hidden gracefully when missing, and leaderboard has no visible regression.
critical_code_review_comments: Non-blocking but important: several backend validation branches (including room/message related ones) still return {"error": ...} with HTTP 200 instead of consistent 4xx HTTPException responses.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for requested room/profile identity and privacy flows

test_credentials: Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md; preview uses dev auth bypass user test@izlek.dev (MOCKED auth flow).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* profile/room/participant/message documents via public API for integration verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI checks were executed on the public preview URL from frontend/.env. Payload inspection from browser requests confirmed no area/study field is sent in /api/rooms and /api/rooms/join. Verified private join two-step UX (code lookup -> password), public join without password, and RoomPage participant/chat study field rendering fallback behavior.
rca of the issue: No functional regression found in requested scope. One Playwright run failed due test script argument usage in page.evaluate (test harness issue), then rerun completed and all target checks passed.
